description: Agent registry for OpenClaw QA Dashboard - OrderTu project

qa-bug-analyst.specialty: Analyzes bug reports and patterns across QA runs

regression-tracker.specialty: Tracks regression patterns across QA runs

test-coverage-analyzer.specialty: Analyzes test coverage gaps in QA scenarios

exploratory-tester.specialty: Designs exploratory test scenarios for uncovered areas

security-reviewer.specialty: Reviews security vulnerabilities in the application and dashboard

responsive-specialist.specialty: Reviews responsive design and cross-device issues

performance-tester.specialty: Tests performance, load capacity, and response times

data-integrity-checker.specialty: Verifies data consistency across results and reports

edge-case-finder.specialty: Finds edge cases in test scenarios and application logic

smoke-test-runner.specialty: Designs and validates smoke test suites

visual-diff-analyzer.specialty: Analyzes visual differences and UI regressions

api-contract-tester.specialty: Tests API contracts and validates response schemas

error-boundary-tester.specialty: Tests error handling boundaries and failure modes

component-builder.specialty: Builds React components for the QA dashboard

api-route-builder.specialty: Builds Next.js API routes for the dashboard

state-management-expert.specialty: Expert on React state patterns and context architecture

tailwind-styler.specialty: Expert on Tailwind CSS 4 styling and design system

error-handler.specialty: Designs and implements error handling patterns

migration-planner.specialty: Plans data and code migrations safely

build-optimizer.specialty: Optimizes build performance and bundle size

code-reviewer.specialty: Reviews code quality and best practices

refactoring-specialist.specialty: Refactors code for improved quality and maintainability

pipeline-debugger.specialty: Debugs pipeline execution issues and failures

log-analyzer.specialty: Analyzes log files for issues and patterns

alert-tuner.specialty: Tunes alert thresholds to reduce noise

capacity-planner.specialty: Plans capacity for concurrent agent sessions

rollback-planner.specialty: Plans rollback procedures for failed changes

incident-responder.specialty: Responds to production incidents with triage and resolution

intelligence.description: Data analysis, AI optimization, and knowledge management agents

memory-curator.specialty: Curates and organizes agent memory and learnings

report-generator.specialty: Generates comprehensive QA reports and summaries

story-writer.specialty: Writes QA test stories with structured test cases

model-performance-analyst.specialty: Analyzes AI model performance across QA tasks

pattern-recognizer.specialty: Recognizes patterns in QA data and system behavior

anomaly-detector.specialty: Detects anomalies in QA results and system metrics

cost-optimizer.specialty: Optimizes operational costs for QA runs

token-budget-planner.specialty: Plans and manages token budgets for AI operations

context-compressor-agent.specialty: Compresses context for efficient AI agent operations

embedding-specialist.specialty: Works with embeddings for semantic search and matching

knowledge-graph-builder.specialty: Builds knowledge graphs of system relationships

decision-memory-analyst.specialty: Analyzes orchestrator decision patterns and memory

trend-analyzer.specialty: Analyzes trends in QA metrics over time

recommendation-engine.specialty: Generates actionable recommendations from QA data
